title: NQBlade Trailing SL
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext:
In this video you can see how the bot manages the trade after entry, including a trailing stop loss in action and full take profit execution.

The position is managed step by step, allowing profits to be secured while still giving the trade room to continue if momentum stays strong. This is one of the key parts of the strategy: not just finding entries, but also managing trades in a structured way.

If you’re interested and want more details, feel free to message me.

comments.author: moonrakerdust
comments.body: What's the trailing settings for this?
